nasb.text: They will fight against you, but they will not overcome you, for I am with you to deliver you,” declares the Lord.

esv.text: They will fight against you, but they shall not prevail against you, for I am with you, declares the Lord, to deliver you.”

cnv.text: 他們必攻擊你，卻不能勝過你，因為我與你同在，要拯救你。”這是耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 他们必攻击你，但绝不能胜过你，因为我与你同在，我必拯救你。这是耶和华说的。”
